signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send a code to confirm registration.

signin.title: Sign in
signin.subtitle: Enter your email or phone — we'll send a code to sign in.

confirm.title: Confirmation

hint.EMAIL: We sent a code to your email. Enter it to continue.
hint.PHONE: We sent a code to your phone. Enter it to continue.
hint.TOTP: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

confirm.lastResend: Note: that was the last resend of the code.
confirm.exhaustedAttempts: Wrong code, no attempts left. Request a new code.
confirm.exhaustedExpired: The code has expired. Request a new code.
confirm.deadEnd: You've run out of entry attempts and resends. Start signing in again.

errors.signup: Sign up failed. Please try again later.
errors.signin: Sign in failed. Please try again later.
errors.confirm: Could not confirm the code. Please try again.
